encounter.reason: Pathology review, molecular results review, goals-of-care discussion, treatment planning for non-small cell lung cancer
encounter.service_provider: The University of Texas MD Anderson Cancer Center

screening.name: ECOG performance status
screening.description: Restricted in physically strenuous activity but ambulatory and able to carry out work of a light or sedentary nature

conditions.name: non-small cell lung cancer, adenocarcinoma subtype, right upper lobe primary
conditions.description: Final staging: Stage IIIA (T2b N2 M0). KRAS G12C positive, PD-L1 TPS 60% (high expression). EGFR wild-type, ALK negative, ROS1 negative, BRAF V600E negative, MET amplification negative. Unresectable disease given N2 nodal involvement.

document_references.description: Comprehensive oncology progress note documenting review of finalized pathology, molecular profiling (KRAS G12C positive, PD-L1 TPS 60%), and imaging results. Includes final staging determination (Stage IIIA, T2b N2 M0), detailed discussion of treatment options including chemo-immunotherapy recommendation, clinical trial opportunity (NCT05820295), goals-of-care conversation, code status confirmation (full code), and advance directive discussion.

diagnostic_reports.description: EGFR wild-type, ALK rearrangement negative, ROS1 rearrangement negative, BRAF V600E negative, KRAS G12C positive, MET amplification negative. Finalized 2024-10-10.
Tumor proportion score 60% (high expression). Associated with EBUS-TBNA specimen.

diagnostic_reports.type: surgical pathology — endobronchial ultrasound-guided transbronchial needle aspiration
diagnostic_reports.description: Adenocarcinoma confirmed in mediastinal lymph node stations 4R and 7. Immunohistochemistry TTF-1 positive, CK7 positive, CK20 negative, p40 negative, consistent with pulmonary origin.
FDG-avid right upper lobe mass (SUVmax 12.4), FDG-avid ipsilateral mediastinal nodes (SUVmax 8.1 at station 4R), no distant metastases.
